title: My Community Found a FREE TradingView Indicator… The Backtest Blew My Mind
author: DaviddTech
summary_bullets: Today, we're going to be testing this indicator here.
This was sent to me by my community.
It's new and popular on TradingView.
But for that to happen, we're going to have to start right now.
So guys, here I am on TradingView.
This indicator and the full setup that we're going to be trying today was sent to me by a member of my community.
And I'm really excited because it not only has it been backtested, but we've actually put it into live trading for a couple of months to make sure it actually works.
So the indicator is called the Commodity Trend by BigBuruga, a very popular pine script developer on TradingView in the recent couple of months.
And it's always good to find new and interesting indicators on TradingView by some of these absolutely amazing developers that give everything away for free.
Let's get over to my chart.

extracted_rules: So if you've been following me for a while, we all know that having just one indicator on the chart just makes it look pretty.
I let my system take care of all of my trades from the beginning all the way through the risk management.
For that, we need to know the rules.
The rules, as always, with me are known in advance.
Nobody wants to be chopped in and out of markets like here, where each and every one of our entries are going to get hit the stop loss.
When price is above it and it is green, we're looking for longs.
And when price is below and it's orange, we're looking for shorts.
When it goes above these zero lines here, it goes green and that's when we can take a long.
And when it goes below these zero lines here, we go red and that's when we can start thinking about taking shorts.
The ADX is one of my favorite indicators to keep us out of markets when they're going sideways.
When the ADX is above the moving average, we can actually take any long or short positions.
I've marked on the chart our first entry so that we can just go through the rules one more time.

We're going to set our stop loss to the ATR bands and we're going to set our risk to reward to a 1.5 and boom, we only just about managed to hit the take profit on that one there but it was a winning trade and a perfectly cherry peaked trade.

If we scroll down and look at the bench mark which I absolutely love that Trading View has added this that we can see that currently if you would have purchased Avax around here you would currently be down at 14% and you would have been underwater up to 39%.
We currently are in a short trade at the moment and if I put the buy and hold onto the chart we absolutely crushed the buy and hold except for this little period here.
